productName: Solr Bear - Live Rosin XL - Cartridge - 1g - (S) Citrus Cloud
description: A hybrid vape cartridge filled with Citrus Cloud oil — smooth, flavorful vapor in a discreet, no-torch, push-button format that goes wherever you go. Smooth, discreet, and flavorful — a bright, zesty citrus flavor, with a versatile, anytime balance.
